The '''''Blind Luck''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] that was owned by [[Desric Fol]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The aging freighter's computer systems rarely calculated accurate [[hyperspace route]]s.

{{Ship-stub}}
